Monday morning at 5:00 a.m. It pulls the
last 7 days of Fathom transcripts. So,
it goes into Fathom, pulls the
transcripts.
>> Is that through Co-Work?
>> Yeah, through Co-Work.
>> Okay.
>> So, it pulls it up and then it finds the
ones most like so for like last week I
had a few personal ones. They're just
nonsense, but they're not going to be
good content. It's like you get 11
calls. Here's eight that are probably
the best ones. Great. It then goes and
um
>> And how does it know to separate those?
>> I just trained it so many times. So,
>> based on the prompt that it knows which
Fathom calls to pull.
>> Um not even the prompts now. It's
because of how the task is now
scheduled. I'll show you really quick in
inside this so you can kind of see it.
So, it shows like scheduled. So, I know
what's going to pull, right? So, this
happens every single week. And then it
pulls all the transcripts and then it
starts to write content through a
different skill. So, we have what we
call a content mine. That's a very
robust prompt that we basically built
out. And it's creating as many carousels
as possible and all the body copy for
all the platforms. And then also do the

scripts based off what I said and all
the body copy. And then it goes
and it runs checks against everything

status.

happens, let me show you this.
